channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: X-Men ’97 has what Master of the Universe is missing
item.description: In 2026, Marvel and Mattel are both releasing projects designed to capitalize on people's love for iconic animated heroes from their childhoods. Masters of the Universe has put a live-action He-Man on the big screen, and the second season of X-Men '97 is about to fling some of Charles Xavier's mutants into an apocalyptic future. […]

item.title: Creative Assembly is developing its own custom technology for Alien: Isolation 2 'to really fine tune the experience and create exactly the best Alien experience'
item.description: Creative Assembly has confirmed that Alien: Isolation 2 will be built with Unreal Engine 5, but the team is also developing custom technology.

item.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
item.description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

item.title: How to watch Germany vs. Curaçao online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Germany vs. Curaçao in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.title: DJI and Insta360 go to war in the U.S. over its action gimbal cameras
item.description: DJI and Insta360 are now battling it out in court over patents related to their gimbal action cameras.

item.title: Sealed Super Mario Bros. sells for a record $3 million
item.description: A copy of Super Mario Bros., still in the box and sealed with its original sticker, just sold at Heritage Auctions for $3 million. That absolutely crushes the previous record of $2 million, also for a copy of Super Mario Bros., in 2021. That sale also came hot on the heels of a controversial auction […]
